audit_items.proof_trace: nfp_asm.h contains zero dynamic memory allocations: all static inline functions perform only bit-field manipulation on scalar primitives (u32, bool, swreg/__u32) and return by value. The universal quantification forall alloc(p) ranges over an empty set, making the assertion vacuously true. No kmalloc, kzalloc, vmalloc, or equivalent allocator is present anywhere in this header file.
